title: Leetcode 1797. Design Authentication Manager
shortDescription: Manage tokens that expire timeToLive seconds after creation/renewal, supporting generate, renew (only if the token is still unexpired), and countUnexpiredTokens (with expirations at time t processed before actions at t). The core challenge is efficiently tracking and removing expired tokens — typically handled with a token->expiry map plus a min-heap/queue for lazy expiration cleanup.

Leetcode 1797. Design Authentication Manager

Manage tokens that expire timeToLive seconds after creation/renewal, supporting generate, renew (only if the token is still unexpired), and countUnexpiredTokens (with expirations at time t processed before actions at t). The core challenge is efficiently tracking and removing expired tokens — typically handled with a token->expiry map plus a min-heap/queue for lazy expiration cleanup.
